strategy: Hit with Storm (+30%); it resists Myth 63%.
On Round 1 it protects itself with three -100% Universal Shields plus a 5,000 Damage Absorb, and hands each Wizard a Shatter (The Emperor Card).

Break through the wall: cast the granted Shatter to strip the shields, or throw cheap hits to burn the -100% shields and the Absorb before your real attack. The Shatter is optional but makes it far faster.
Once the protected wards and Absorb are cleared, stack blades and land one big Storm hit.
cheatNotes: Round 1 it self-casts three protected -100% Universal Shields and a protected 5,000 Absorb, then gives everyone a Shatter card to break them.
You can win without casting the granted Shatter, but it clears the shield wall much faster.
